The Challenge

Optimize

{{ report.metric_name }}

{% if report.metric_direction == "higher" %} Higher is better {% else %} Lower is better {% endif %}

The Job to be Done

This workflow iteratively optimizes {{ report.metric_name }} by testing variants of the target files. Each experiment proposes a change, measures the impact, and keeps the improvement or discards the attempt.

The system is constrained by the workflow configuration: certain files and patterns are fixed, while others are open for experimentation. The goal is to find the {{ report.metric_direction }} value through systematic exploration.

Experiment Scope

    {% for target in report.targets %}
  • {{ target.path }} {{ target.description }}
    • {% endfor %}
